name: rag-docqa
description: RAG-powered Doc Q&A v2 — Embeddings, ChromaDB, Semantic Retrieval (Day 11)

scripts.start: nohup node server.js > /tmp/rag-server.log 2>&1 & sleep 2 && open http://localhost:3001
scripts.dev: nohup node --watch server.js > /tmp/rag-server.log 2>&1 & sleep 2 && open http://localhost:3001
